questions.scenario: A bad release wrote wrong status values for two hours. Which question does recovery point answer?

options.text: Which moment in time can the data be restored to?
Which VM has the most CPU?

questions.explanation: The recovery point is the moment the restored data represents.

questions.scenario: A temporary export can be recreated, but paid order records cannot be casually lost. What should drive different recovery targets?

options.text: Whether the file name has a slash.

questions.explanation: Recovery point needs should follow business impact, not service defaults.

questions.scenario: Which data might need different recovery point expectations?

options.text: The shape of a button in the UI.

questions.explanation: Different data shapes and business impact lead to different recovery targets.
